name: osf-schemas
description: OSF SMProfile schemas (ISA-95 / CESMII): profiles, sources, sync, validation.

scripts.validate: npm run validate:category && npm run validate:constraints && npm run validate:recipes && npm run validate:delivery && npm run validate:cross && npm run validate:refs && npm run validate:edges && npm run validate:mtconnect && npm run validate:aliases && npm run validate:contract && npm run validate:docs && npm run test:vocabulary && npm run validate:vocabulary && npm run validate:counters && npm run test:kpis && npm run validate:kpis
